title: Here’s a Timeline of Trump’s Ultimatums Over the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: President Trump first gave Iran 48 hours to reopen the vital oil shipping route on March 21. The deadline has been reset many times since.
summary_public: President Trump first gave Iran 48 hours to reopen the vital oil shipping route on March 21. The deadline has been reset many times since.
